prompt: A haunting minimal scene showing a line of abandoned personal belongings arranged across a barren ground, including a worn child’s shoe, a broken pair of glasses, and a faded family photograph in the foreground, each object gradually transitioning into increasingly large and dense piles of coins and fragments of currency as they recede into the distance, the money becoming more overwhelming and dominant further away, subtle fog but with the currency still clearly visible, soft natural light on the personal objects and colder harsher light reflecting off the distant money, faint barely visible linear textures in the ground suggesting an underlying system, muted desaturated tones, strong negative space, cinematic composition, ultra realistic, highly detailed, no text, no labels, no charts
insight: War systems convert human lives into economic gain, leaving behind loss and displacement.
